curation_notes: The advisory describes a YAML deserialization RCE in PraisonAI agent definitions. The patch commit b1048da ('refactor: harden input validation and bump to 1.5.115/4.5.115') modifies src/praisonai/praisonai/cli/features/agent_tools.py to (1) reject absolute file paths in _sanitize_filepath and (2) add semicolon as a dangerous command separator in _sanitize_command. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. The advisory description references TypeScript/js-yaml but the actual codebase and fix are in Python. The pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization is retained because the root cause is untrusted YAML agent definitions being deserialized and their tool operations executed with insufficient input validation (CWE-502).
